ARTORIACASTER-ARTORIA_CASTER.title: Artoria Caster
ARTORIACASTER-ARTORIA_CASTER.description: The Child of Prophecy from the Britain of fae, sent across the Inner Sea to save a doomed land — and still trying, one journey at a time. She forges Caliburn Stars and mana as a Caster, then opens a reckless summer Berserker window to cash them in as devastating Criticals. Around Caliburn nullifies the unstoppable; Hope Will Camelot executes.
ARTORIACASTER-ARTORIA_CASTER.goldMonolog: Gold? That is... a lot of gold. I will keep it safe for everyone! As the party fund! ...Perhaps one souvenir.
ARTORIACASTER-ARTORIA_CASTER.eventDeathP: The staff glows warm and sighs in a lazy, flowery voice: not yet, little star. Artoria wipes her eyes, plants the Staff of Selection, and stands back up. Let's try it. One more time.
ARTORIACASTER-ARTORIA_CASTER.aromaPrinci: It smells of morning bread and rain on hay, like the village before the pilgrimage. She keeps smiling, the way the Child of Prophecy must. Nobody needs to know about the tears.
ARTORIACASTER-ARTORIA_CASTER.banter.aliv: Um, whenever you're ready! No pressure! ...Okay, maybe a little pressure. Let's try it!
ARTORIACASTER-ARTORIA_CASTER.banter.dead: So the prophecy was wrong about me after all... I'm sorry... I really did want to save everyone...
